author: x1han
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open local HTML study pages in Obsidian with native browser rendering for CSS, MathML, SVG diagrams, and visual notes.

manifest.description: Open local HTML study pages with native browser rendering for CSS, MathML, SVG diagrams, and visual notes.

releases.author: x1han
releases.description: Fixes Obsidian community review findings: removes redundant directory context from the description, points authorUrl to the author profile, and replaces builtin-modules with node:module builtinModules.
releases.name: HTML Canvas 0.1.1

releases.author: x1han
releases.description: Initial HTML Canvas release. Opens local HTML files in Obsidian with native browser iframe rendering for CSS, MathML, SVG diagrams, and visual learning pages. Default Native File Mode uses sandboxing without allow-scripts.
releases.name: HTML Canvas 0.1.0
